# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
      name: functionApp
      type: Microsoft.Web/serverlessFunctions
      apiVersion: '2022-03-01'
      properties:
        location: eastus
        osType: linux
        managedDependencyIdentities:
          - apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
            name: ManagedIdentity1
        functionSize: ConsumptionPlan
        functions:
          - name: FunctionName
            properties:
              functionTimeout: 10
              executionTraceEnabled: true
              enabled: true
              logging: 'detailedError'
              appSettings:
                - name: APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY
                  value: <instrumentationKey>

    - apiVersion: '2019-08-01'
      name: identity
      type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities
      apiVersion: '2021-08-01'
      properties:
        location: eastus
        userAssignedIdentityName: ManagedIdentity1

    - apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
      name: storageAccount
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      properties:
        location: eastus
        sku:
          name: Standard_LRS
        kind: StorageV2
        identity:
          principalId: '[resourceId("/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/ManagedIdentity1")]'
          tenantId: '[tenantId]'
          type: UserAssigned
      resources:
        - name: storageAccountContributor
          properties:
            roleName: 'storage account contributor'
            dataActions: ['*']
            notActions: []
            permissions: ['*']

    - apiVersion: '2016-10-01'
      name: keyVault
      type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
      properties:
        location: eastus
        sku: {'name': 'Premium'}
        identity:
          principalId: '[resourceId("/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/ManagedIdentity1")]'
          tenantId: '[tenantId]'
          type: UserAssigned
      resources:
        - name: keyVaultContributor
          properties:
            roleName: 'Key Vault Contributor'
            dataActions: ['*']
            notActions: []
            permissions: ['*']

    - apiVersion: '2017-04-01-preview'
      name: sqlServer
      type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
      properties:
        location: eastus
        administratorLogin: <adminUser>
        administratorLoginPassword: '<adminPassword>'
        version: '12.0'
        minimumTlsVersionEnforced: V1_2
        identity:
          principalId: '[resourceId("/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/ManagedIdentity1")]'
          tenantId: '[tenantId]'
          type: UserAssigned
      resources:
        - name: sqlServerSqlDbContributor
          properties:
            roleName: 'SQL Server Contributor'
            dataActions: ['*']
            notActions: []
            permissions: ['*']

    - apiVersion: '2015-04-08'
      name: cosmosdbAccount
      type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
      properties:
        location: eastus
        databaseAccountOfferType: Standard
        kind: GlobalDocumentDb
        identity:
          principalId: '[resourceId("/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/ManagedIdentity1")]'
          tenantId: '[tenantId]'
          type: UserAssigned
      resources:
        - name: cosmosdbAccountDbAccountContributor
          properties:
            roleName: 'Cosmos DB Account Contributor'
            dataActions: ['*']
            notActions: []
            permissions: ['*']
